name: Nevada King Gold Corp.
description: Nevada King Gold Corp. is a junior gold explorer focused on the Atlanta Gold Mine Project, a 130 km² past-producing open-pit gold mine in eastern Nevada with over 1 million ounces of measured and indicated oxide gold resources. The company achieved Tier 1 issuer status on the TSXV in October 2025 and has a Phase 4 exploration program underway targeting additional oxide gold discoveries at Silver Park East.
